next_step.current_state: Pre-submit check: task asks which projects lab server is involved in, return exact project names sorted alphabetically, one per line. function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in 99_system, entities, cast, and projects; used canonical entity alias then structured project search.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/foundry.md` identifies the lab server as alias `foundry` (relationship `lab_server`). `10_entities/cast/juniper.md` is `home_server`, confirming disambiguation. Searching `40_projects` for `entity.foundry` found 5 project READMEs, each read to extract exact titles.
